info.title: Xperience Font Awesome Integrator
info.description: This .NET Global Tool parses and processes content from the Font Awesome 5 web .zip and integrates that content into Xperience for use with Content Management

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --font-awesome-path
options.description: Full path to content folder extracted from fontawesome-**-web.zip
